insights.title: 💡 Look for: Aeroplan business
insights.detail: Aeroplan to Middle East via Turkish J through IST. 70K standard. (up to 70,000 pts, ~7¢/pt)

insights.title: 💡 Look for: Alaska Mileage Plan first
insights.detail: Emirates F via Alaska — 115K OW. One of the best F products in the sky. (up to 115,000 pts, ~10¢/pt)

insights.title: 💡 Look for: Emirates Skywards business

routeSweetSpots.description: Aeroplan to Middle East via Turkish J through IST. 70K standard.
Emirates F via Alaska — 115K OW. One of the best F products in the sky.
Emirates J direct to DXB — 72.5K OW. Game changer when available.
Emirates F to DXB — the iconic shower suite experience. 136K OW.

warnings: ⚠️ Chase UR → Emirates Skywards transfers ENDED Oct 2025
⚠️ Virgin Atlantic does NOT book Emirates flights
⚠️ Alaska only has 47,660 — enough for ~1 business OW or 1 economy RT
